zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert De Fouleshurst於1330年出生在英國英格蘭爾艾德萊斯頓時，他的父親Richard De Foulehurst25歲，母親Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst24歲。他於1354年之前與Elizabeth de Praers在英國爾奧維 奧福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1389年11月16日在英國爾巴堂姆利享年59歲，埋葬在英國爾巴堂姆利聖 貝托林也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert De Fouleshurst于1330年出生在英国英格兰爾艾德萊斯頓时，他的父亲Richard De Foulehurst25岁，母亲Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst24岁。他于1354年之前与Elizabeth de Praers在英国爾奧維 奧福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1389年11月16日在英国爾巴堂姆利享年59岁，埋葬在英国爾巴堂姆利聖 貝托林也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert De Fouleshurst was born in 1330, in Edleston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard De Foulehurst, was 25 and his mother, Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst, was 24. He married Elizabeth de Praers before 1354, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 16 November 1389, in Barthomley, Cheshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in St Bertoline's Church, Barthomley, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert De Fouleshurst est né en 1330, à Edleston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard De Foulehurst, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Praers avant 1354, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 novembre 1389, à Barthomley, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à St Bertoline's Church, Barthomley, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert De Fouleshurst 1330 in Edleston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard De Foulehurst 25 und seine Mutter Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst 24. Er hat vor 1354 in Over Peover, Cheshire, England Elizabeth de Praers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. November 1389 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Barthomley, Cheshire, England und wurde in St Bertoline's Church, Barthomley, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert De Fouleshurst è nato il nel 1330 nel Edleston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard De Foulehurst, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Praers prima del 1354, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 novembre 1389, nel Barthomley, Cheshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a St Bertoline's Church, Barthomley, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Fouleshurstが1330年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエドレストンで生まれた時，父Richard De Foulehurstは25歳，母Mrs. Richard De Foulehurstは24歳であった。1354年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーでElizabeth de Praersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1389年11月16日にイギリスチェシュアイアバーソムリーで59歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアバーソムリースト バートライネ'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Bertoline's Church, Barthomley, Chesh: 영국 체실르 바톰리 스트 버톨이인'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Fouleshurst(이)가 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 에들레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard De Foulehurst(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1354년 이전 영국 체실르 버 p오버에서 Elizabeth de Praers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1389년 11월 16일 영국 체실르 바톰리에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 바톰리 스트 버톨이인'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert De Fouleshurst nasceu em 1330, em Edleston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard De Foulehurst, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Praers antes 1354, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.St Bertoline's Church, Barthomley, Chesh: ст биртолаине'с чурч, бартомли, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert De Fouleshurst родился в 1330 г. в местности эдлестон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard De Foulehurst было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Richard De Foulehurst, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Praers перед 1354 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 16 ноября 1389 г. в местности бартомли, чешир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ст биртолаине'с чурч, бартомли, чешир, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth de Praers antes de 1354, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de noviembre de 1389, en Barthomley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en St Bertoline's Church, Barthomley, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
